channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jesse Jackson: tributes and reactions from Bernice King, Trump and Biden after civil rights leader’s death – latest updates
item.description: Follow latest updates as public figures praise civil rights leader who was a protege of Martin Luther King Jr and twice ran for Democratic presidentia...

item.title: France releases suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker after huge fine, as Ukraine peace talks begin – Europe live
item.description: Volodymyr Zelenskyy earlier called for ‘justice and strength’ in diplomacy after Russia hit Ukraine with 400 drones and 29 missiles hours before talks...

item.title: Warner Bros gives Paramount seven days to make ‘best and final’ offer
item.description: Waiver from Netflix allows film company to engage with rival bidder if it could lead to a ‘reasonably superior offer’ Business live – latest updates W...

item.title: Farage insults female reporter as Braverman says Reform UK wants to scrap Equality Act – UK politics live
item.description: Party leader tells FT journalist she should ‘write some silly story’ after press conference revealing roles for his top team Nigel Farage is speaking....

item.title: ‘One of America’s greatest patriots’: US political leaders pay tribute to Jesse Jackson
item.description: Kamala Harris, Al Sharpton, Donald Trump and more react to the death of the civil rights leader at the age of 84 Jesse Jackson, civil rights leader, d...

item.title: Rousey to face Carano in first MMA bout in 10 years
item.description: Former UFC champion Ronda Rousey will fight Gina Carano in May - a decade after she retired from MMA.

item.title: Legal challenge to Met's Freemasons policy thrown out
item.description: The Met had announced that membership of the Freemasons or similar organisations would have to declared.

item.title: Dual nationals face scramble for UK passports as new rules come into force
item.description: Entry requirements to the UK for dual nationals are being overhauled as part of sweeping changes to the immigration system.

item.title: Why are some students claiming Covid compensation from universities?
item.description: Dozens of universities face legal action from students who say they missed out during the pandemic.

item.title: Viral face depuffing tricks - skin experts reveal if they work
item.description: We look at three viral hacks to unpick fact from fiction - the effects are often at best, temporary, say experts.
